issues.description:
`POST /sessions/{sessionId}/reset`:

1. Mark current session as`reset`
2. Create new session (same report_id + report_version + user_id)
3. Copy summary v1 from original session to new one (pinning)
4. New session becomes active

issues.summary: [BE] Add new table to DB for custom groups' apps presets
issues.description:
### Summary

Create a PostgreSQL table to store predefined app group presets. Each preset defines a curated bundle of apps with per-app weighting, scoped to a specific country. This table is the persistence layer that enables the frontend to offer CSMs a "Presets" dropdown in the Select Applications modal.

### Context

* Presets are maintained as backend configuration, not hardcoded in the UI (DR-6)
* Each preset record contains: preset ID, country code, display name, list of app IDs with corresponding weighting values
* Initial data set: \~22 German bundles defined by PMM (see PRD Section 8)
* Presets are country-specific — Germany presets must not appear when UK is selected (DR-5)

### Scope

* Create migration in `db/migration/` using golang-migrate sequential naming
* Table design must support:

    * Preset identity: unique ID, country code, display name
    * App list with per-app weighting values (e.g., JSONB column)
    * Active/inactive flag for soft-disabling presets without deletion
    * Ordering field for controlling display order in the dropdown
    
* Seed migration with the 22 German presets from the PRD (app IDs to be resolved from existing app catalog)

### Out of Scope

* GET endpoint - <custom data-type="smartlink" data-id="id-0">https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/RSW-1039</custom>
* Admin UI / CRUD operations for preset management
* UK preset definitions (Germany-only for initial launch)

### Dependencies

* App IDs for the 22 German bundles must be mapped from app names to existing catalog IDs before seed data can be finalized

### Definition of Done

- [x] Migration created and tested locally (`make compose-dbmigrate`)
- [x] Table schema supports all fields from DR-6 (preset ID, country code, display name, app IDs + weighting)
- [ ] Seed data for 22 German presets included

issues.summary: [FE] Integrate Retry Button with dedicated BE endpoint
issues.description:
Users need a way to re-trigger GenAI summary generation that have failed.

Acceptance Criteria:

* Retry button calls `POST /reports/{id}/genai/sessions/{sessionId}/retry` when clicked
* Button is only visible/enabled when report is in a errored state
* UI shows summary after successful retry call
